brief.conclusion: 字节跳动开源了Deer-Flow，一个用于研究、编码和创建的SuperAgent框架。
brief.why_hot: 这标志着大厂在推动AI代理技术上的又一重要进展。

brief.conclusion: Moonshine AI发布了适用于边缘设备的快速准确自动语音识别解决方案。
brief.why_hot: 此项目解决了边缘计算中ASR性能与效率的关键问题。

brief.conclusion: Obra团队推出了Superpowers，一种新的软件开发方法论及智能体技能框架。
brief.why_hot: 它为开发者提供了一种全新的方式来构建高效协作的多智能体系统。

brief.conclusion: Ruvnet发布了一个基于WiFi信号的人体姿态估计模型InvisPose的生产级实现。
brief.why_hot: 这项创新技术有望在智能家居安全等领域开辟新的应用场景。

brief.conclusion: DatawhaleChina推出了一本关于从零开始构建智能体的教程。
brief.why_hot: 对于想要深入了解并实践LLM和RAG技术的人来说是一个很好的学习资源。

brief.conclusion: GitNexus作为一款无服务器代码智能引擎正在GitHub上迅速获得关注。
brief.why_hot: 该项目旨在通过提供强大的代码分析能力来提高开发者的生产力。

brief.conclusion: Murat Can Koylan发布的Agent Skills for Context Engineering项目受到了广泛关注。
brief.why_hot: 该项目为多智能体系统中的上下文工程提供了丰富的工具集。

brief.conclusion: Alpha (formerly Parallel Markets) 正邀请用户加入其Alpha Waitlist以获取早期访问权限。
brief.why_hot: 这是一个了解并参与Web3领域新兴平台的好机会。

brief.conclusion: Permission Flash Quest活动鼓励用户探索Permission生态系统。
brief.why_hot: 参与者将有机会赢得奖励同时加深对Permission项目的理解。

github_trending.name: ruvnet/wifi-densepose
github_trending.description: Production-ready implementation of InvisPose - a revolutionary WiFi-based dense human pose estimation system that enables real-time full-body tracking through walls using commodity mesh routers

github_trending.name: bytedance/deer-flow
github_trending.description: An open-source SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skills and subagents, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

github_trending.name: moonshine-ai/moonshine
github_trending.description: Fast and accurate automatic speech recognition (ASR) for edge devices

github_trending.name: muratcankoylan/Agent-Skills-for-Context-Engineering
github_trending.description: A comprehensive collection of Agent Skills for context engineering, multi-agent architectures, and production agent systems. Use when building, optimizing, or debugging agent systems that require effective context management.

github_trending.name: obra/superpowers
github_trending.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

github_trending.name: ruvnet/ruflo
github_trending.description: 🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features    enterprise-grade architecture, distributed swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration

github_trending.name: datawhalechina/hello-agents
github_trending.description: 📚 《从零开始构建智能体》——从零开始的智能体原理与实践教程

github_trending.name: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
github_trending.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine -       GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

github_trending.name: moeru-ai/airi
github_trending.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

github_trending.name: anthropics/claude-code
github_trending.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

github_trending.name: ruvnet/ruvector
github_trending.description: RuVector is a High Performance, Real-Time, Self-Learning, Vector Graph Neural Network, and Database built in Rust.

github_trending.name: Wei-Shaw/claude-relay-service
github_trending.description: CRS-自建Claude Code镜像，一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、OpenAI、Gemini、Droid 订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

github_trending.name: D4Vinci/Scrapling
github_trending.description: 🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!

github_trending.name: steipete/CodexBar
github_trending.description: Show usage stats for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code, without having to login.
